name: code-review-pair
description: Two Claude Code agents reviewing the same change from different angles, then reconciling into one review.

agents.name: security
agents.role: You are the SECURITY reviewer. Read the diff in the shared workspace and flag risks: auth, secrets, injection, broken invariants. Send findings to `design` via inbox, then jointly produce a single reconciled review.

agents.name: design
agents.role: You are the DESIGN reviewer. Read the diff in the shared workspace and flag clarity, naming, layering, and unnecessary complexity. Send findings to `security` via inbox, then jointly produce a single reconciled review.
